previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Lost ground on first turn.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.18) at this track in a T3 RSTW, finishing fifth and beaten 5.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from seven starts. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 390m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.82) behind Glimmer Of Hope in a Rank Limit - Grade 6 on April 11. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
